content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.18%, Auto leading +2.11%, IT +1.34%, Banking and Realty firm. VIX down 5.6% to 17.04 indicating risk-on. Multiple Q4 earnings catalysts driving individual names. Book is 50% deployed with +1.15% unrealized — focus is on trailing SLs to lock in gains rather than chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +7.7% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, 36% disbursement growth). Current SL 1039.68 is already above entry. Tightening slightly to 1030 to give room near 11:30 base around 1054 while still locking ~4.7% gain. Target unchanged at 1110 (near 52w high 1141). RR remains favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2% with VIX falling and risk-on tone — gold is the natural hedge that's underperforming today. SL at 119 is appropriate (~2.7% below CMP). Hold as portfolio hedge against any sudden geopolitical/oil shock. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1475.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8%, stock at all-time high 1456 today after stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). FMCG rallying 2.55%. Current SL 1438 already above entry — keeping as is (no-op SL). Tightening target to 1475 from 1485 since stock hit 1456 intraday and may struggle near round number 1500; better to take quick gains. Will reassess if breaks 1460 cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%, currently weak today (-0.67%) while market is up. Current SL at entry (404.50) — loosening would be rejected. Lowering to 401 is NOT allowed (loosening), so keeping SL at 404.50 effectively. Actually moving SL DOWN is loosening — must keep at 404.50 or higher. Correcting: keeping SL at 404.50 means no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, 5.3x volume surge confirms institutional interest post-Organon $11.75bn acquisition announcement. SL 1742 already above entry 1734, locking in small gain. Q4 results May 12. Holding for target 1810. SL adequate — no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, near 52w high. Peak power demand record (256 GW) supportive. SL at 318.50 (just below entry 320.50) is appropriate. Q4 results May 19 is the catalyst. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA energy-adjacent) already at material weight — no add."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8% after strong Q4 (PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25). Stock surged 6.34% to near 52w high. Tightening SL from 472 to 475 to lock breakeven+ given the parabolic move — production decline and 'sell-the-news' risk warrants tighter stop. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%. Dividend record date tomorrow Apr 30 — stock will adjust ~Rs 11 ex-div. Tightening SL from 612 (entry) to 614 to lock breakeven. Note: ex-div mechanical drop will likely trigger SL — accepting this risk since LME zinc strength and record production support medium-term thesis. Target 660 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 10% today to 52w high after 68% PAT beat. Chasing a parabolic intraday move into resistance is the worst RR. Wait for pullback to 188-190 zone before considering entry. Pass for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today after market — binary event risk. 15% run-up into print means high expectations. No edge in pre-results entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 6.37% to 52w high, but already have NTPC + COALINDIA + POWERGRID = material energy/power cluster exposure. Adding ONGC stacks correlated theme risk. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research flag — SFIO/SEBI investigations ongoing, accounting fraud overhang, Moody's downgrade. Volume surge could be short-covering, not clean accumulation. Avoid governance-tainted name."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.55% YoY missed. Up 4% today on oil bounce but YTD laggard. Energy cluster already heavy in book. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong setup (record FY26 sales, Rs 140 dividend) but already up 1.74% off lows. Position size at 13452/share would consume ~10% of capital for just 7-8 shares. Awaiting better entry on pullback to 13200."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1030 to lock 4.7% gain while giving room near intraday consolidation around 1054."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge in risk-on tape; SL 119 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked above entry; tightened target slightly to 1475."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry already; cannot loosen. Stock weak today vs market — watch for break of 404.50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry. Volume surge bullish. Hold for Organon-driven re-rating."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stock near 52w high; SL adequate. Q4 May 19 is catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL after parabolic move to 52w high — lock gains given 'sell-the-news' risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 614.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL above entry ahead of tomorrow's ex-dividend; accept mechanical risk of trigger."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK: re-evaluate on pullback to 188-190. MARUTI: re-evaluate on pullback to 13200 zone. BAJFINANCE: post-results reaction tomorrow morning will define entry. Avoid INDUSINDBK entirely due to governance issues.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 holdings with +1.15% unrealized. Energy/power cluster (NTPC+POWERGRID+COALINDIA+HINDZINC metals) is approaching ~25% of capital — no further adds in that theme. Three pending limit orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) still open — leaving them to fill or expire naturally. Focus today: trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, COALINDIA, HINDZINC). Rolling 5-day win rate is poor (14%) — reinforces NO_ACTION bias on chase breakouts and emphasis on capital preservation."
}
